title: The Sky Becomes the Battlefield
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on the sky becomes the battlefield, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Sky Becomes the Battlefield. Pell carries Alabasta’s hope into the air as the bomb plot reaches its most sacrificial moment. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: That's not very smart of you men...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You should take better care of your lives... Though I suppose it's too late for that now...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: If you want to die so badly,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Then I guess I don't even need to lend a hand, do I?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: KUHAHAHAHAHAHAHA! This sight is the very meaning of stupidity!

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: cease this at once, chaka! You cannot die here as well!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: So you're the type to die for others too...

summary: This part develops the sky becomes the battlefield and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
